activity.name: Extract_Budget_Data
activity.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT b.budget_id, b.period_id, b.cost_centre, b.gl_account, b.budget_amount, b.forecast_amount, p.fiscal_year, p.fiscal_quarter, p.fiscal_month, cc.department_name, cc.business_unit FROM finance.budget_plans b JOIN finance.periods p ON b.period_id = p.period_id JOIN finance.cost_centres cc ON b.cost_centre = cc.cost_centre_id WHERE p.fiscal_year = 2024 AND b.is_approved = 1

activity.name: Load_Budget_Actuals
activity.sqlWriterQuery: INSERT INTO gold.budget_actuals_summary SELECT ba.period_id, ba.cost_centre, ba.gl_account, ba.budget_amount, ba.forecast_amount, a.actual_amount, (ba.budget_amount - a.actual_amount) AS variance, (a.actual_amount / NULLIF(ba.budget_amount, 0)) AS achievement_pct, p.fiscal_year, p.fiscal_quarter FROM finance.budget_plans ba JOIN finance.actuals a ON ba.period_id = a.period_id AND ba.cost_centre = a.cost_centre AND ba.gl_account = a.gl_account JOIN finance.periods p ON ba.period_id = p.period_id
